name: unstoppable-domains
description: Search, register, and manage domain names through natural conversation. 60 tools for domain search, DNS management, marketplace listings, cart/checkout, backorders, AI landing pages, and portfolio management.

scopes.name: portfolio:read
scopes.description: View your domains, DNS records, and offers

scopes.name: portfolio:write
scopes.description: Manage DNS, create listings, and send messages

apiKeyAlternative.description: API key from Account Settings → Advanced → MCP API Key

tools.name: ud_domains_search
tools.title: Search Domain Availability
tools.description: Search for domain availability and pricing across TLDs. Up to 10 queries and 5 TLDs per request. Returns marketplace.source and marketplace.status to determine which cart tool to use.

tools.name: ud_tld_list
tools.title: List Available TLDs
tools.description: List all ICANN TLDs supported by the registrar. Call before searching specific TLDs to verify support.

tools.name: ud_expireds_list
tools.title: Browse Expiring Domains
tools.description: Browse the pending-delete / expireds marketplace. Domains spend 5 days in COMING_SOON then drop to AVAILABLE_BACKORDER. Filter by status, TLD, label length. Up to 500 results per call.

tools.name: ud_knowledge_base_search
tools.title: Search Help Articles
tools.description: Search the Unstoppable Domains Knowledge Base for help articles by keyword. Returns articles ranked by relevance with titles, snippets, and direct links. No authentication required.

tools.name: ud_portfolio_list
tools.title: List Portfolio Domains
tools.description: List domains with filtering and sorting. Use for portfolio-wide scans, rankings, aggregates. Returns per-domain offersCount, leadsCount, watchlistCount, listing price/status. Page size up to 500.

tools.name: ud_domain_get
tools.title: Get Domain Details
tools.description: Comprehensive domain info for up to 50 explicitly named domains. Returns lifecycle (renewal, expiration, auto-renewal), flags, DNS config, marketplace metrics, tags, and pending operations.

tools.name: ud_contacts_list
tools.title: List ICANN Contacts
tools.description: List ICANN contacts for DNS domain registration. Check before creating new contacts.

tools.name: ud_contact_create
tools.title: Create ICANN Contact
tools.description: Create an ICANN contact required for DNS domain registration (.com, .org, .net, etc.). Use the account email for instant verification.

tools.name: ud_cart_get
tools.title: View Shopping Cart
tools.description: Get current shopping cart contents with pricing breakdown.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_domain_registration
tools.title: Add Domain Registration to Cart
tools.description: Add domains for fresh registration. For marketplace.source='unstoppable_domains' with marketplace.status='available'. Max 50 domains.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_domain_listed
tools.title: Add Listed Domain to Cart
tools.description: Add UD marketplace domains to cart. For marketplace.source='unstoppable_domains' with marketplace.status='registered-listed-for-sale'. Supports Lease-to-Own. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_domain_afternic
tools.title: Add Afternic Domain to Cart
tools.description: Add Afternic marketplace domains to cart. For marketplace.source='afternic'. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_domain_sedo
tools.title: Add Sedo Domain to Cart
tools.description: Add Sedo marketplace domains to cart. For marketplace.source='sedo'. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_domain_renewal
tools.title: Add Domain Renewal to Cart
tools.description: Add domain renewals to cart. 1–10 years per domain. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_cart_remove
tools.title: Remove Cart Item
tools.description: Remove items from the shopping cart.

tools.name: ud_cart_get_payment_methods
tools.title: Get Payment Methods
tools.description: Get saved credit cards and account balance for checkout.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_payment_method_url
tools.title: Get Add Payment Method URL
tools.description: Get an authenticated magic link URL to add a new payment method. Valid 60 seconds, single-use.

tools.name: ud_cart_checkout
tools.title: Checkout Cart
tools.description: Complete checkout. Requires ICANN contact for DNS domains. Uses account balance by default; pass paymentMethodId if balance is insufficient.

tools.name: ud_cart_get_url
tools.title: Get Checkout URL
tools.description: Generate an authenticated magic link checkout URL for browser purchase. Valid 60 seconds, single-use.

tools.name: ud_listing_create
tools.title: Create Marketplace Listing
tools.description: Create marketplace listings (max 50). Set price, offer settings, validity, and LTO options. Response may include a signing magic link.

tools.name: ud_listing_update
tools.title: Update Marketplace Listing
tools.description: Update existing marketplace listings (max 50). May require re-signing.

tools.name: ud_listing_cancel
tools.title: Cancel Marketplace Listing
tools.description: Cancel marketplace listings (max 50).

tools.name: ud_offers_list
tools.title: List Domain Offers
tools.description: List incoming offers on your domains. Filter by status and domain.

tools.name: ud_offer_respond
tools.title: Respond to Offer
tools.description: Accept or reject offers (max 50). Acceptance may require signing.

tools.name: ud_leads_list
tools.title: List Domain Conversations
tools.description: List conversation threads. Filter by domain. skipEmpty: true (default) hides empty threads.

tools.name: ud_lead_get
tools.title: Get or Create Conversation
tools.description: Get or create a conversation for a domain. Returns existing or creates new.

tools.name: ud_lead_messages_list
tools.title: List Conversation Messages
tools.description: Get messages in a conversation (newest-first, cursor pagination).

tools.name: ud_lead_message_send
tools.title: Send Conversation Message
tools.description: Send a message in a conversation (max 1000 characters).

tools.name: ud_dns_records_list
tools.title: List DNS Records
tools.description: List all DNS records for a domain. Filter by type and subName.

tools.name: ud_dns_record_add
tools.title: Add DNS Records
tools.description: Add DNS records (max 50). Supports A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, NS, SRV, CAA. upsertMode: append, replace, or disallowed (default). Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_dns_record_update
tools.title: Update DNS Record
tools.description: Update an existing DNS record by record ID. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_dns_record_remove
tools.title: Remove DNS Record
tools.description: Remove a specific DNS record by ID. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_dns_records_remove_all
tools.title: Remove All DNS Records
tools.description: Remove ALL DNS records from a domain. Requires confirmDeleteAll: true. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_dns_nameservers_list
tools.title: List Nameservers
tools.description: List nameservers for a domain. Shows UD default vs custom status and DNSSEC info.

tools.name: ud_dns_nameservers_set_custom
tools.title: Set Custom Nameservers
tools.description: Set custom external nameservers (2–12 hostnames). Optional DNSSEC DS records. Disables DNS record management. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_dns_nameservers_set_default
tools.title: Reset to Default Nameservers
tools.description: Switch back to UD default nameservers. Re-enables DNS record management. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_dns_hosting_list
tools.title: List Hosting Configurations
tools.description: List hosting configurations for a domain (listing pages, redirects).

tools.name: ud_dns_hosting_add
tools.title: Add Hosting Configuration
tools.description: Add hosting config: LISTING_PAGE, REDIRECT_301, or REDIRECT_302. forceCompatibility: true auto-switches nameservers. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_dns_hosting_remove
tools.title: Remove Hosting Configuration
tools.description: Remove hosting configuration. deleteAll: true with confirmDeleteAll: true removes all. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_pending_operations
tools.title: Get Pending Operations
tools.description: List pending operations across domains (up to 50). Use after DNS changes to track propagation.

tools.name: ud_domain_auto_renewal_update
tools.title: Update Auto-Renewal
tools.description: Enable or disable auto-renewal for ICANN domains. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_tags_add
tools.title: Add Domain Tags
tools.description: Add tags (up to 10 tags, 20 chars each). Auto-creates new tags. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_tags_remove
tools.title: Remove Domain Tags
tools.description: Remove tags. Idempotent — skips unapplied tags. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_flags_update
tools.title: Update Domain Flags
tools.description: Update WHOIS privacy and transfer lock flags. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_push
tools.title: Push Domain to Another User
tools.description: Transfer domains to another user by account ID. Requires MFA (6-digit OTP). Max 50.

tools.name: ud_backorder_create
tools.title: Create Domain Backorder
tools.description: Create backorders for expiring domains. Requires ICANN contact and availability timestamp. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_backorders_list
tools.title: List Backorders
tools.description: List user backorders with status filtering, search, and pagination.

tools.name: ud_backorder_cancel
tools.title: Cancel Backorder
tools.description: Cancel pending backorders. Returns refund information.

tools.name: ud_ai_credits_get
tools.title: Get AI Credit Balance
tools.description: Check AI credit balance and view available packs. New accounts get 5 free credits.

tools.name: ud_cart_add_ai_credits
tools.title: Add AI Credits to Cart
tools.description: Add an AI credit pack to cart by productCode or tierSize.

tools.name: ud_domain_generate_lander
tools.title: Generate AI Landing Page
tools.description: Generate AI-powered landing pages. 1 credit per domain. Custom instructions supported. Async. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_lander_status
tools.title: Check Lander Status
tools.description: Check generation status: pending, generating, processing, hosted, failed, or none. Max 50.

tools.name: ud_domain_download_lander
tools.title: Download Landing Page
tools.description: Download lander content. Returns htmlContent (single-page) or zipContent (base64 zip).

tools.name: ud_domain_upload_lander
tools.title: Upload Custom Landing Page
tools.description: Upload custom lander (HTML or base64 zip). Requires Domainer Club. Max 1MB. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_domain_remove_lander
tools.title: Remove Landing Page
tools.description: Remove an AI landing page from a domain. Supports applyToAllDomainsInPortfolio.

tools.name: ud_presets_list
tools.title: List DNS Presets
tools.description: List saved DNS presets and hardcoded provider presets.

tools.name: ud_presets_save
tools.title: Save DNS Preset
tools.description: Create or update a preset (nameserver, DNS record, forwarding). Upserts by name.

tools.name: ud_presets_delete
tools.title: Delete DNS Preset
tools.description: Delete a saved preset by type and name.

tools.name: ud_presets_apply
tools.title: Apply DNS Preset
tools.description: Apply a preset to domains. Supports bulk and portfolio-wide operations.

tools.name: ud_authenticated_url_get
tools.title: Get Authenticated URL
tools.description: Generate a one-time authenticated URL for browser redirect. Valid 60 seconds, single-use.
